first_goal.description: Scored a match-winning free-kick in stoppage time on his debut.

mls_debut.result: New York Red Bulls 0-2 Inter Miami

managers.name: Gerardo 'Tata' Martino
importance: Coached Messi during his arrival at Inter Miami.
Won the club's first-ever trophy (2023 Leagues Cup).
Previously managed Messi with both FC Barcelona and Argentina.

managers.name: Javier Mascherano
importance: Leading Inter Miami during the next phase of Messi's MLS career.
Competing in MLS, CONCACAF Champions Cup and FIFA Club World Cup.

shirt_history.reason: Messi was immediately awarded Inter Miami's iconic No.10 shirt upon signing.

playing_roles.description: Started from the right side before drifting centrally to create chances and score.
Played alongside Luis Suárez, linking midfield and attack while exploiting spaces between defenders.
Dropped deeper to orchestrate attacks, dictate tempo and provide decisive passes.
Became Inter Miami's primary creative force, leading the team's build-up play and chance creation.

legacy.status: The greatest player in Inter Miami history
considered: One of the greatest players in Major League Soccer history
One of the greatest footballers of all time
legacy.description: Messi transformed Inter Miami from one of Major League Soccer's struggling clubs into a global football powerhouse. He led the club to its first-ever trophy by winning the 2023 Leagues Cup, followed by the 2024 Supporters' Shield. His arrival dramatically increased worldwide attention toward MLS, boosted attendance and television audiences, and established Inter Miami as one of the most recognized football clubs globally. Alongside former Barcelona teammates Sergio Busquets, Jordi Alba and Luis Suárez, Messi helped usher in the most successful era in the club's history while continuing to perform at an elite level.

major_events: Joined Inter Miami after leaving Paris Saint-Germain.
Scored a dramatic stoppage-time free-kick winner on his debut against Cruz Azul.
Scored in every Leagues Cup knockout round.
Led Inter Miami to its first trophy in club history by winning the 2023 Leagues Cup.
Won the Leagues Cup Golden Boot and Best Player awards.
Made his MLS debut against New York Red Bulls and scored after coming off the bench.
Reached the U.S. Open Cup Final before missing the match through injury.
Won a record eighth Ballon d'Or while playing for Inter Miami.

iconic_matches.description: Made his debut and scored a stunning stoppage-time free-kick to win the match.
Scored from long range as Inter Miami reached its first-ever major final.
Scored a spectacular opening goal and converted his penalty as Inter Miami won its first trophy.

iconic_matches.result: New York Red Bulls 0-2 Inter Miami
iconic_matches.description: Made his MLS debut and scored after coming on as a substitute.

records_broken: Led Inter Miami to the first trophy in club history.
Finished as the inaugural Leagues Cup Golden Boot winner under the expanded tournament format.
Won his eighth Ballon d'Or while playing for an MLS club.
Became the fastest player in Inter Miami history to reach 10 goals.
Scored in seven consecutive Leagues Cup matches.

individual_awards: MLS Most Valuable Player (Landon Donovan MVP)
MLS Player of the Matchday (Multiple Times)
major_events: Played his first full season with Inter Miami.
Led the club to the MLS Supporters' Shield, the first in club history.
Set a new MLS single-season points record for Inter Miami.
Finished the regular season with 23 goals and 13 assists despite missing matches through injury and international duty.
Won the MLS Most Valuable Player award.
Became the fastest player in MLS history to record multiple goal contributions in consecutive matches.
Recorded five assists in a single MLS match against the New York Red Bulls, equaling the league record.
Continued to establish Inter Miami as one of the world's most recognized football clubs.

iconic_matches.result: Inter Miami 6-2 New York Red Bulls
iconic_matches.description: Produced one of the greatest individual performances in MLS history with one goal and five assists.
Scored twice as Inter Miami secured the 2024 MLS Supporters' Shield.
Scored his first MLS hat-trick as Inter Miami finished the regular season with a league-record points total.
Returned from injury and immediately changed the match with a goal and an assist.

records_broken: Won the first MLS MVP award in Inter Miami history.
Helped Inter Miami set a new MLS single-season points record.
Equaled the MLS record with five assists in a single match.
Became the first Inter Miami player to win the MLS Golden Boot race's MVP combination (club MVP and league MVP).
Recorded the highest goal contribution rate in MLS during the 2024 regular season.

major_events: Began a new era under head coach Javier Mascherano.
Continued as Inter Miami's captain and primary attacking playmaker.
Led the club in goals and chance creation across all competitions.
Competed in the expanded FIFA Club World Cup.
Reached another milestone in career goal contributions.
Remained one of Major League Soccer's most influential players despite a carefully managed workload.

iconic_matches.description: Returned from injury and scored shortly after coming off the bench to help Inter Miami advance.
Scored Inter Miami's only goal despite the team's defeat.
Scored a spectacular match-winning free-kick as Inter Miami recorded its first victory in FIFA Club World Cup history.
Provided a key assist as Inter Miami secured qualification for the knockout stage.

records_broken: First Inter Miami captain to lead the club at the FIFA Club World Cup.
Scored Inter Miami's first goal from a direct free-kick in FIFA Club World Cup history.
Extended his record as Inter Miami's all-time leader in goal contributions.
Continued to rank among the MLS leaders in goal contributions per 90 minutes.

major_events: Began his fourth season with Inter Miami.
Continued as club captain under Javier Mascherano.
Opened Inter Miami's new home stadium with a goal.
Reached 900 senior career goals.
Represented Argentina at the 2026 FIFA World Cup during the mid-season break.
Remained Inter Miami's leading attacking player before the MLS schedule paused for the World Cup.

iconic_matches.description: Inspired a second-half comeback with two goals and an assist.
Scored the first official goal at Inter Miami's new stadium.
Became the all-time leading goalscorer in FIFA World Cup history.
Scored in a record seventh consecutive FIFA World Cup match.

records_broken: Became the all-time leading men's goalscorer in FIFA World Cup history.
First player to score in seven consecutive FIFA World Cup matches.
Continued as Inter Miami's all-time leader in goals and goal contributions.

club_records: Greatest player in Inter Miami history.
Led Inter Miami to the first major trophy in club history (2023 Leagues Cup).
Led Inter Miami to its first MLS Supporters' Shield (2024).
Inter Miami's all-time leader in goals.
Inter Miami's all-time leader in assists.
Inter Miami's all-time leader in goal contributions.
Inter Miami's all-time leader in free-kick goals.
Fastest player in club history to reach 10 goals.
Fastest player in club history to reach 25 goals.
Fastest player in club history to reach 50 goal contributions.
First Inter Miami player to win the MLS Most Valuable Player award.
First Inter Miami player to win the Ballon d'Or.
First Inter Miami player to win the FIFA The Best Men's Player award.
Part of the legendary 'Barcelona Four' alongside Luis Suárez, Sergio Busquets and Jordi Alba.

major_milestones.event: Signed for Inter Miami as a free agent.
Made debut and scored a stoppage-time winning free-kick against Cruz Azul.
Led Inter Miami to its first-ever trophy by winning the Leagues Cup.
Won the MLS Most Valuable Player award.
Recorded five assists in a single MLS match, equaling the league record.
Competed in the expanded FIFA Club World Cup with Inter Miami.
Scored Inter Miami's first-ever FIFA Club World Cup goal from a direct free kick against FC Porto.
Continued as club captain and all-time leading scorer.

timeline.event: Announced his decision to join Inter Miami.
Officially unveiled at DRV PNK Stadium.
Made debut and scored a stoppage-time free-kick winner against Cruz Azul.
Won the Leagues Cup, Inter Miami's first trophy.
Made his MLS debut and scored against New York Red Bulls.
Recorded one goal and five assists against New York Red Bulls.
Helped Inter Miami secure the MLS Supporters' Shield.
Won the MLS Most Valuable Player award.
Scored a match-winning free kick against FC Porto in the FIFA Club World Cup.
Helped Inter Miami qualify for the FIFA Club World Cup knockout stage.
Began his fourth season with Inter Miami.
